changes.reason: Adds a distinct AirPods audio symptom cluster that is currently only listed as a related placeholder and is directly covered by Apple Support.

queries: AirPods 只有一只耳机有声音
canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles cover pairing/reset, charging/case failures, firmware updates, and Find My setup. None provides the official one-side audio test, balance check, cleaning, reset, and replacement-device branch from Apple Support 100494.
